name: COSORI 6L Air Fryer with DC Motor
pros: Largest capacity (6L) ideal for families and entertaining guests
360° heat circulation and DC motor ensure even, fast cooking
Excellent Rakuten rating (4.73★) with 475 reviews backing reliability
cons: At ¥19,980, it's significantly pricier than smaller models
Bulky size may be challenging in small Japanese kitchens
shortDescription: Premium 6L air fryer with DC motor for family-sized, healthier cooking.
review: COSORI's flagship 6L model is built for larger households and entertaining. The DC motor and 360° circulation deliver consistent results, and the high review count suggests real user satisfaction. It's a premium investment, but if you entertain regularly or have a big family, the capacity justifies the cost. Note: recipes included are English-friendly.
